task: feat: ferramenta WebSearch com DuckDuckGo como fallback gratuito e Firecrawl opcional (issue #51)

todos.title: Add WebConfig struct, parse [web] section in devon.toml, wire into Config.Load(), update .devon.toml.example
Implement html2md converter in internal/tools/web/ with Go module dependency for HTML-to-Markdown
Implement DuckDuckGo backend — scrape https://lite.duckduckgo.com/lite/ for search + HTTP GET for fetch
Implement Firecrawl backend — search and fetch via Firecrawl API when DEVON_FIRECRAWL_KEY is set
Implement web_search Tool with backend selection (auto → Firecrawl if key present else DuckDuckGo)
Implement web_fetch Tool with backend selection and html2md conversion
Add RegisterWebTools function in builtin.go and call it from agent.New() when web.enabled is true
Extend Config.Doctor() to print active web backend and connectivity status
Write table-driven tests for html2md covering headings, links, lists, code blocks, and empty input
Write tests for DuckDuckGo backend with mock HTTP server for search and fetch endpoints
Write tests for Firecrawl backend with mock HTTP server simulating API responses
Write table-driven tests for web_search and web_fetch tools covering backend selection, timeout, errors
Create docs/advanced-setup.md with web configuration examples, backend selection, and env vars reference
Run full build, test, vet, lint suite until green — ensure zero breaking change when [web] section absent
